title: The Barrier Repair Bay

features.name: the serviced gate-mechanism
features.desc-on-touch: hinges that have been oiled by seventeen different hands; each one left their temperature in the grease

features.name: parts inventory
features.desc-on-touch: replacement bolts, hinges, latches, all the hardware that keeps arrival from reversing into departure; sorted by year and decade

features.name: the work-bench
features.desc-on-touch: where gates are improved; the tools remember every adjustment that ever made the gate function better, and every one that made it worse

features.name: the paradox door
features.desc-on-touch: this gate-replica was built to test changes; it has become a gate that can exit in both directions simultaneously if you believe hard enough

features.name: maintenance log
features.desc-on-touch: every repair written in fading ink; the earlier entries speak in urgency, the later ones in the patient voice of work that will never be finished

inscription: the gate that nothing leaves needs constant maintenance; the archive oils its hinges and dreams of the day when holding still costs no labour

file.name: Gate_Mechanism_Service_Log_1994-Present.txt
file.note: handwritten notes on maintenance; the handwriting changes seven times as different keepers tend the barrier; at the end, the entries grow tender

exits.label: back west to the gate itself, standing eternal in its perfect non-function
east to where broken things go to dream of repair
north to the archive's infrastructure, all the unseen work that holds arrival in place
